04c9d274fb0aaa3429c941b7e951f06a48e83a6d: $$f(x) = \prod_{n = 1}^{100}\left(\tan {\frac{\pi x^n}{4}} - n\right)$$

239978d15c9f4824b9fed2d8b7b948874b4a1473: $$f^{\prime}(1) =$$

9fbdb103d58473cfd85027275aab64d657912432: $$y = \ln (x + \sqrt{x^2 + a^2}) (a \neq 0)$$

9ebc93846ef86c9c45703e924069d917819ebf78: $$y' \big|_{x=0}$$

5facf48cd892630e23a9a0789776db703cf65fef: $$f(x) = \begin{cases} \ln \sqrt{x}, & x \geqslant 1, \\ 2x - 1, & x < 1, \end{cases}$$

e19a23e36dafd8cb70c08c47c09a6d4e39de4a53: $$y = f[f(x)]$$

401a0abcac6db063d8ce45982d9f821a3daf0b68: $$\frac{\mathrm{dy}}{\mathrm{dx}}|_{x = e} =$$

2414863217f62204d7f46e31a6c1e6304cfc46bf: $$y = \mathrm{e}^{\sin (\ln x)}$$

4661aae765b492d092dde21042d5c0b7b713a80d: $$\mathrm{dy}$$

71dcfe9e6c199080b4e598a8e29e54318cf248d0: $$\frac{\mathrm{dy}}{\mathrm{dx}}$$

e55d10d997bebc44b9cbf1b21a3a88ffe3ca0e45: $$y'$$

189c7c9fe407c5b2499d28664bae5711ec4bc95d: $$y = \left|x\mathrm{e}^{-x}\right|$$

9325ccb640967275c2d1eb1351fda42536918897: $$x > 0$$

7ec95063ee503da0a3aa6f43768a1553e1d7fcc5: $$y = f(x) = 3x^{2} + \mathrm{e}^{x}$$

0f10453af5ba58ec9e6d16831a1f857b22eb5aa3: $$x = \varphi (y)$$

9705c3b8860541e8655278d958176a779f75b616: $$\varphi^{\prime \prime}(3 + \mathrm{e}) = .$$
